evals.prompt: Create a dropdown menu component using reka-ui with Tailwind CSS styling.
evals.expected_output: Reka UI DropdownMenu composition with proper imports from 'reka-ui', Tailwind classes
expectations: Uses composition pattern (DropdownMenuRoot, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem)
Applies Tailwind CSS classes for styling

evals.prompt: Add lucide icons to my Vue 3 component for a search input with a clear button.
evals.expected_output: Named imports from lucide-vue-next with size and styling props
expectations: Uses named imports (tree-shakeable), not a global icon component
Shows size prop usage (:size="20" or similar)
Demonstrates class or color prop for styling

evals.prompt: Set up toast notifications in my Vue 3 app using vue-sonner.
evals.expected_output: Toaster component in App.vue, toast() usage in components
expectations: Adds <Toaster /> component to App.vue or root layout
Demonstrates toast.success(), toast.error(), or toast() variants

evals.prompt: How do I self-host Roboto Mono font in my Vue project using fontsource?
evals.expected_output: Install @fontsource/roboto-mono, import in main.ts, apply in CSS
expectations: Imports specific weights (400, 700) or the full package
Import is done in main.ts or equivalent entry point
